## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project [code style guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md#code-style)
- [ ] Shell scripts pass `shellcheck`
- [ ] Python code passes `ruff check` and `ruff format --check`
- [ ] Tests pass: `bats tests/unit/ tests/lint/`
